Valve may be preparing for the Steam Machine launch, according to new import tracking shared by Brad Lynch. The VR and Valve hardware watcher says Valve has received… [+1807 chars]

articles.author: Rockstar Games
articles.title: Execute Old School Hits in the First Featured Community Mission - Rockstar Games
articles.description: Bump off a trio of high-profile targets in Old School Hits, a loving homage to three classics from the original Grand Theft Auto trilogy and our first featured Community Mission utilizing the new Rockstar Mission Creator.
